## Summary

- Describe the user-visible or operator-visible change.

## Checks

- [ ] `just check`
- [ ] `just test`
- [ ] `just lint`
- [ ] Documentation updated if setup, behavior, deployment, policy, or data handling changed

## Security And Data

- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or `.env` files are committed
- [ ] Authn/authz impact was reviewed if endpoints, actions, or permissions changed
- [ ] Logging impact was reviewed for sensitive data exposure
- [ ] Provider, model, or external service changes were reviewed for data handling impact

## Release Notes

- Note operator-facing changes, migration steps, or release risks.
